languages.text: {n}Перелет до планеты проходит в штатном режиме. Все меняется, когда пилот сообщает о входе в атмосферу и привлекает ваше внимание к иллюминаторам. Шаттл проплывает среди гигантских корней и лоз, оплетающих планету сплошным трепещущим покровом. Вы завороженно наблюдаете за движением в зарослях, когда пилот сообщает о потере вокс-контакта с флагманом. А затем на корпус обрушивается тяжелый удар...{/n}

{n}The flight down to the planet proceeds as normal. This changes when the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Перелет до планеты проходит в штатном режиме. Все меняется, когда пилот сообщает о входе в атмосферу и привлекает ваше внимание к иллюминаторам. Шаттл проплывает среди гигантских корней и лоз, оплетающих планету сплошным трепещущим покровом. Вы завороженно наблюдаете за движением в зарослях, когда пилот сообщает о потере вокс-контакта с флагманом. А затем на корпус обрушивается тяжелый удар...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The journey to the planet proceeds as normal. All changes as the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. You watch, spellbound, the movement within the growths, when the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then, a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

{n}The flight down to the planet proceeds as normal. This changes when the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

{n}The journey to the planet proceeds as normal at first. The pilots talk quietly among themselves, occasionally updating you on the progress of the landing. That is, until the shuttle enters the planet's biosphere and finds itself flying between giant roots. First, the pilots report the loss of vox contact with the flagship, and then heavy strikes land against the hull one after another. After the third hit, the shuttle spins out of control, and the pilot decides to make an emergency landing.{/n}

{n}The journey to the planet proceeds as normal. All changes as the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. You watch, spellbound, the movement within the growths, when the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then, a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

languages.text: {n}惑星への旅は、最初は順調に進む。パイロットたちは静かに話し合い、着陸の進捗状況を時折報告してくれる。しかし、シャトルが惑星のバイオスペアに突入すると、巨大な根の間を飛行することになる。まず、旗艦との音声通信が途絶えたことをパイロットが報告し、次いで、シャトルの船体に連続して重度の攻撃が命中する。3発目の攻撃でシャトルは制御不能に陥り、パイロットは緊急着陸を決断する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The journey to the planet proceeds as normal at first. The pilots talk quietly among themselves, occasionally updating you on the progress of the landing. That is, until the shuttle enters the planet's biosphere and finds itself flying between giant roots. First, the pilots report the loss of vox contact with the flagship, and then heavy strikes land against the hull one after another. After the third hit, the shuttle spins out of control, and the pilot decides to make an emergency landing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gezegene iniş uçuşu normal ilerliyor. Ancak pilot atmosfere girişi anons edip bakışlarını lombozlara yönlendirdiğinde bu durum değişiyor. Mekik, gezegeni devasa ve titreyen bir örtü gibi saran muazzam köklerin ve sarmaşıkların arasından süzülüyor. Büyülenmiş bir şekilde bitki örtüsünün içindeki hareketi izlerken pilot, sancak gemisiyle voks iletişiminin koptuğunu bildiriyor. Sonrasında gövdeye ağır bir darbe iniyor...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flight down to the planet proceeds as normal. This changes when the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Gezegene iniş uçuşu normal ilerliyor. Ancak pilot atmosfere girişi anons edip bakışlarını lombozlara yönlendirdiğinde bu durum değişiyor. Mekik, gezegeni devasa ve titreyen bir örtü gibi saran muazzam köklerin ve sarmaşıkların arasından süzülüyor. Büyülenmiş bir şekilde bitki örtüsünün içindeki hareketi izlerken pilot, sancak gemisiyle voks iletişiminin koptuğunu bildiriyor. Sonrasında gövdeye ağır bir darbe iniyor...{/n}

languages.text: {n}降落到行星表面的航程起初一切正常。直到飞行员宣布进入大气层，并示意你看向舷窗外时，情况骤变。穿梭机滑行于巨大的根须与藤蔓之间，它们像广袤微颤的地幔一样裹住了整个行星。你着迷地望着那些增生体中的异动，而后飞行员便报告说，与旗舰失去了音阵联络。紧接着，一记重击砸在了舰体上……{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flight down to the planet proceeds as normal. This changes when the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}降落到行星表面的航程起初一切正常。直到飞行员宣布进入大气层，并示意你看向舷窗外时，情况骤变。穿梭机滑行于巨大的根须与藤蔓之间，它们像广袤微颤的地幔一样裹住了整个行星。你着迷地望着那些增生体中的异动，而后飞行员便报告说，与旗舰失去了音阵联络。紧接着，一记重击砸在了舰体上……{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Flug zum Planeten verläuft zunächst normal. Das ändert sich, als der Pilot den Eintritt in die Atmosphäre meldet und du nach draußen schaust. Das Shuttle gleitet durch riesige Wurzeln und Ranken, die den Planeten umhüllen wie ein bebender Mantel. Du beobachtest gebannt die Bewegungen innerhalb der Wurzeln, als der Pilot den Abbruch der Verbindung mit dem Flaggschiff meldet. Und dann erschüttert eine heftige Explosion den Rumpf ...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flight down to the planet proceeds as normal. This changes when the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Flug zum Planeten verläuft zunächst normal. Das ändert sich, als der Pilot den Eintritt in die Atmosphäre meldet und du nach draußen schaust. Das Shuttle gleitet durch riesige Wurzeln und Ranken, die den Planeten umhüllen wie ein bebender Mantel. Du beobachtest gebannt die Bewegungen innerhalb der Wurzeln, als der Pilot den Abbruch der Verbindung mit dem Flaggschiff meldet. Und dann erschüttert eine heftige Explosion den Rumpf ...{/n}

languages.text: {n}Au départ, le trajet se déroule sans encombre. Tout change lorsque le pilote annonce l'entrée dans la biosphère. Votre regard se porte sur les hublots. La navette se faufile entre les gigantesques racines et lianes qui cernent la planète. Vous êtes {mf|captivé|captivée} par cette étendue de végétation. Tout à coup, le pilote annonce avoir perdu contact avec le vaisseau amiral. Soudain, quelque chose vient percuter la coque de plein fouet...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flight down to the planet proceeds as normal. This changes when the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Au départ, le trajet se déroule sans encombre. Tout change lorsque le pilote annonce l'entrée dans la biosphère. Votre regard se porte sur les hublots. La navette se faufile entre les gigantesques racines et lianes qui cernent la planète. Vous êtes {mf|captivé|captivée} par cette étendue de végétation. Tout à coup, le pilote annonce avoir perdu contact avec le vaisseau amiral. Soudain, quelque chose vient percuter la coque de plein fouet...{/n}

languages.text: {n}El descenso al planeta se desarrolla según lo esperado, pero todo cambia cuando el piloto anuncia la entrada atmosférica y llama tu atención a los ventanales. La lanzadera esquiva las raíces y lianas colosales que cubren el mundo en un manto inmenso y tembloroso. Fascinad{mf|o|a}, observas movimiento entre los brotes antes de que el piloto informe de que ha perdido el contacto de voco con la nave insignia. Después, un tremendo impacto sacude el casco...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flight down to the planet proceeds as normal. This changes when the pilot announces atmospheric entry, beckoning your gaze toward the viewports. The shuttle glides through colossal roots and vines, which swathe the planet in a vast, quivering mantle. Spellbound, you watch the movement within the growths, before the pilot reports losing vox-contact with the flagship. And then a heavy blow strikes the hull...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El descenso al planeta se desarrolla según lo esperado, pero todo cambia cuando el piloto anuncia la entrada atmosférica y llama tu atención a los ventanales.
